home.title: Ferme du Campeyrigoux
home.subtitle: Micro-ecological organic farm
home.organicGardeningDesc: Production of fresh, seasonal vegetables in organic farming.
home.basketsDesc: Reserve your weekly basket of fresh, organic, seasonal vegetables harvested at the farm.
home.eggsPoultryDesc: Free-range poultry farming and organic egg production.
home.schedule: Every Saturday from 9:30 AM to 12:00 PM
home.location: On the terrace of SAINT SEB
home.solidarityPricing: A solidarity pricing system allows everyone to access quality, organic, local food.
home.heroTag: Local, organic and seasonal production in the Cevennes
home.highlight1Text: Market gardening and farm productions run with an organic approach.
home.highlight2Text: Vegetable baskets, direct sales and a simple relationship with the farm.
home.highlight3Text: A farm based in Saint-Sebastien-d'Aigrefeuille, in the heart of the Cevennes.
home.activitiesIntro: A human-scale farm combining vegetable production, baskets, direct sales and other agricultural workshops in a progressive and coherent way.
home.diversificationDesc: The farm is also developing other crops and activities to build a resilient agricultural model.
home.directSaleIntro: A simple weekly direct-sale moment to find farm products, ask questions and reserve your baskets.
home.scheduleDetail: Meet us every week for direct sales.
home.qualityText: Farm products, seasonal produce and direct contact with the farm.
home.step1Text: I browse the baskets or come directly during the sales slot.
home.step2Text: I send my request and receive confirmation by email.
home.step3Text: I collect my order at the location and time confirmed by the farm.
home.whereToFindUsText: Direct sales take place in Saint-Sebastien-d'Aigrefeuille, in a simple setting accessible to local residents.
home.trustIntro: The project is built around local farming, an organic approach and the desire to make farm products accessible over time.
home.trustCard1Text: The farm focuses on living soils, seasonality and practical organic production.
home.trustCard2Text: The farm is rooted in the Cevennes with a strong local direct-sale approach.
home.ctaTitle: Reserve a basket or get in touch
home.ctaText: If you want to follow availability, reserve a basket or simply learn more about the farm, start here.
home.simpleBasketsDesc: The goal is to make ordering easy to understand: you choose your basket, then your pickup or delivery method. Farm pickup is for baskets reserved on the website.
home.pickupFarmDesc: A simple solution to come pick up your reserved basket directly at the farm, upon email confirmation.
home.pickupPointDesc: Depending on availability, you can choose a convenient pickup location.
home.deliveryTourDesc: For certain cities, a delivery tour may be offered.
home.directSaleNote: Farm sales are not the same as farm pickup for baskets. Here, it is a direct sales time for harvested or harvestable vegetables and other products available at the farm.
home.howItWorksStep1Text: I can come to the farm sale for available products, or reserve a basket from the website.
home.howItWorksStep2Text: For baskets, the farm confirms by email the exact location and time slot.
home.howItWorksStep3Text: Payment is made in cash upon pickup or delivery of products.

cbd.title: Discover our Organic CBD
cbd.subtitle: Carefully grown on our organic farm, our CBD is 100% natural and meets the highest quality standards.
cbd.naturalDesc: Grown organically, without pesticides or chemicals.
cbd.certifiedQualityDesc: Regular testing and organic certification guarantee the quality of our products.
cbd.localProductionDesc: From field to table, we control the entire production chain.
cbd.whatIsCbdAnswer: CBD (Cannabidiol) is a natural cannabinoid extracted from hemp. Unlike THC, it has no psychoactive effects and is fully legal in France.
cbd.legalAnswer: Yes, all our products are 100% legal in France. They contain less than 0.2% THC, in accordance with current legislation.
cbd.howToChoose: How to choose my CBD product?
cbd.howToChooseAnswer: The choice depends on your preferences and needs. We offer oils for gradual effect, flowers for infusion use, and derivatives for more specific uses.
cbd.ctaTitle: Ready to discover our CBD products?
cbd.ctaSubtitle: Explore our range of organic and local CBD products

baskets.farmPickupHelp: For baskets reserved on the website.
baskets.pickupHelp: Pickup from a partner point depending on availability.
baskets.deliveryTourHelp: Delivery available only in certain towns.
baskets.farmDefaultSlotHelp: Farm pickup for baskets is set by default on the slot below. You can suggest another time if needed. Cash payment on pickup.
baskets.pickupNotice: Choose the most convenient pickup point. Cash payment on pickup.
baskets.deliveryTourNotice: First enter your town to check whether the tour comes to you, then choose your delivery tour. Cash payment on handover.
